feature_name: Pull-to-refresh UX refinements: content translation + single emoji per pull

tasks.title: Simplify emoji utilities and unit tests
tasks.description: In pullToRefreshUtils.ts: replace PULL_EMOJIS contents with ['rocket', 'gear', 'hourglass', 'sync']. Delete computeEmojiIndex() and its JSDoc. Add pickRandomPullEmoji() that returns a random element from PULL_EMOJIS excluding hourglass. In PullToRefresh.test.ts: remove computeEmojiIndex tests, add tests for pickRandomPullEmoji (returns value from set, never returns hourglass).
tasks.done_when: computeEmojiIndex deleted, pickRandomPullEmoji exists and is tested, all unit tests pass

tasks.title: Rework PullToRefresh component to content-translation model
tasks.description: Major rework of PullToRefresh.svelte: (1) Template: wrap slot in div.ptr-content with inline translateY(contentTranslateY), change indicator to position:absolute, remove {#key} block and scale transition, render currentEmoji directly. (2) Gesture: add gestureEmoji variable set via pickRandomPullEmoji() at tracking start, rewrite handleTouchStart to always record startTouchY with pendingGesture flag, rewrite handleTouchMove for seamless scroll-to-pull (check scrollTop<=0 when pendingGesture && !isTracking), add reactive contentTranslateY from pullDistance. (3) CSS: indicator to position:absolute, add .ptr-content with will-change:transform, add overscroll-behavior-y:none on scoped :global(main), animate-out on both indicator and content. (4) Emoji: currentEmoji reads gestureEmoji during pull, hourglass during refresh, sync for reduced-motion. Update component render tests accordingly.
tasks.done_when: Content translates down during pull gesture, indicator appears in vacated space, single emoji per pull, seamless scroll-to-pull works, reduced-motion respected, unit tests pass

tasks.title: QA fixes + E2E test updates
tasks.description: Combined task: (1) Add touchcancel handler mirroring touchend behavior in PullToRefresh.svelte, (2) Move overscroll-behavior-y:none from PullToRefresh :global(main) to +layout.svelte scoped main rule, (3) Restructure PULL_EMOJIS to exclude hourglass from the random pool without filtering, (4) Remove unnecessary will-change:transform from .ptr-indicator CSS, (5) Update E2E tests for new DOM structure.
tasks.done_when: touchcancel resets gesture state, overscroll-behavior-y:none is in +layout.svelte (not PullToRefresh), PULL_EMOJIS has no hourglass in random pool, .ptr-indicator has no will-change:transform, E2E spec updated, all quality gates pass (npm run lint, npm run check, npm run test, npm run test:e2e:smoke)

history.note: Feature initiated: UX refinements for shipped pull-to-refresh (content translation + single emoji per pull)
Skipped Discovery (requirements clear from user feedback). Exec plan created. Advancing to Design.
Task breakdown complete: 3 tasks (T1 emoji utils, T2 component rework, T3 E2E updates)

PE validated design: content-translation via translateY on .ptr-content wrapper, seamless scroll-to-pull via touchmove scrollTop check, single random emoji per pull. Confirmed overscroll-behavior-y upgrade from existing contain to none on main. Design respects RELIABILITY.md compositor-only animation rule and FRONTEND.md layer boundaries.
Starting implementation of T1: Simplify emoji utilities and unit tests
T1 complete (utils + tests already updated). Starting T2: Rework PullToRefresh component to content-translation model
Routing to QA for code review of all changes on feat/pull-to-refresh branch
T2 verified complete (component rework with content-translation, preventDefault fix, unit tests pass). Starting T3: Update E2E tests for new DOM structure

QA returned REQUEST CHANGES. T3 expanded to include 4 QA fixes: (1) missing touchcancel handler, (2) overscroll-behavior-y specificity conflict, (3) PULL_EMOJIS array cleanup, (4) remove unnecessary will-change on .ptr-indicator. Rewriting SDE inbox with combined scope.
All tasks (T1, T2, T3) complete. Routing to build-specialist to run full quality gates.
Build verification passed. Routing to QA for final sanity-check review after all QA fixes (touchcancel, overscroll-behavior-y, emoji array, will-change removal) applied.
QA review returned 5 findings (1 CRITICAL, 3 WARNING, 1 SUGGESTION). Routing to SDE for combined fix pass on T3.
Re-review after 5 QA fixes applied (touchcancel handler, overscroll-behavior-y specificity, PULL_EMOJIS cleanup, will-change removal, syncInFlight guard). Routing to QA for focused verification.
All tasks (T1, T2, T3) confirmed complete. Routing to product-manager for acceptance validation against all 8 acceptance criteria.
Feature complete. Exec plan moved to docs/exec-plans/completed/. All 8 acceptance criteria passed.
